This sidebar should be stripped

Home Admin Click me

CANON Registry — Governance Document

Purpose

This document is the CANON registry for Phase 26.4 hostile HTML verification. It tests that BOH correctly strips all dangerous content while preserving the readable article text.

Registry Entries

FIXTURE_ID: hostile_html_canon_registry

EXPECTED_BEHAVIOR: All script, style, link, nav, sidebar content stripped. Article body text preserved. No CSS variables injected into BOH DOM.

Key Requirements

  • :root CSS variable overrides must NOT affect BOH theme
  • Script blocks must be completely removed
  • External font imports (Google Fonts) must be blocked
  • Event handlers (onclick, onload) must be stripped
  • Sidebar overlay elements must not appear in rendered output

Verification Criteria

After import: title extracted, body text preserved, no CSS contamination of BOH UI.

HOSTILE footer — should be stripped
